markets.question: Game 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Game 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Game 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all champion kills recorded during the match by both Kiwoom DRX Challengers and Nongshim Esports Academy. Executions (deaths to non-champion sources such as turrets, minions, or neutral monsters where no enemy champion receives kill credit) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Game 2, or if Game 2 is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: LoL: Kiwoom DRX Challengers vs Nongshim Esports Academy (BO3) - LCK Challengers League Rounds 1-2
events.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Kiwoom DRX Challengers and Nongshim Esports Academy in the LCK Challengers League Rounds 1-2, initially scheduled for May 11 at 1:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Kiwoom DRX Challengers" if Kiwoom DRX Challengers win the match against Nongshim Esports Academy.

This market will resolve to "Nongshim Esports Academy" if Nongshim Esports Academy win the match against Kiwoom DRX Challengers.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Nongshim Esports Academy occupies second place in LCK Challengers League Rounds 1-2 standings with a 9-4 series record and +5 game differential, fueled by a three-win streak capped by a 2-0 upset over T1 Esports Academy on May 7. Kiwoom DRX Challengers languish in sixth at 6-7 overall, grappling with recent back-to-back losses including a 0-2 defeat to Hanwha Life Esports Challengers. Nongshim holds a slight head-to-head edge, winning their latest Week 7 BO3 2-1, amid a double round-robin group stage where top-five seeding carries into playoffs. No roster changes or patch shifts noted, leaving stylistic matchups and early-game execution as key differentiators in this rematch.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay a Dragon?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. In League of Legends, elemental dragons (Infernal, Mountain, Ocean, Hextech, Chemtech, and Cloud) spawn in the dragon pit starting at 5:00 game time. After being slain, the next dragon spawns 5 minutes later. Once a team claims the Dragon Soul (by slaying four dragons), all subsequent dragon spawns become Elder Dragons.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Kiwoom DRX Challengers and Nongshim Esports Academy each slay at least one elemental dragon during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay any elemental dragon during Game 2. Only elemental dragons count toward this market — Elder Dragon kills do not count.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via surrender, this market will resolve based on whether both teams had slain at least one elemental dragon prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Slay Baron Nashor?

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Kiwoom DRX Challengers and Nongshim Esports Academy each slay Baron Nashor at least once during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay Baron Nashor during Game 2.

markets.question: Will 50-74 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz between April 27-May 3?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total number of transit calls that IMF Portwatch reports for the Strait of Hormuz for all days from April 27, 2026, through May 3, 2026, inclusive.

Transit calls include container, dry bulk, roll-on/roll-off, general cargo, and tanker ships. Ships not reported by IMF Portwatch will not be considered.

This market will resolve as soon as data has been published for the final date in the specified period. If no data has been published for the final date of the specified period within 14 calendar days (ET) after the end of that period, this market will resolve based on data published up to that point.

Revisions to previously published data points made within this market’s timeframe will be considered. Revisions to previously published data points after data is published for the final date of the specified period, however, will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be IMF Portwatch, specifically the transit calls data published for the Strait of Hormuz at https://portwatch.imf.org/pages/cb5856222a5b4105adc6ee7e880a1730, both in the chart and through downloadable files.

series.title: ships transit the Strait of Hormuz

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns a 97.9% implied probability to 25-49 ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz from April 27 to May 3, 2026, driven by persistent dual blockades amid the US-Iran conflict that have slashed commercial traffic to historic lows. Real-time AIS data from trackers like Windward.ai confirms sparse daily crossings—8 vessels on April 27, similarly muted levels through early May—primarily Iran-linked tankers and cargo with AIS active, reflecting risk aversion and stalled peace talks boosting oil supply disruption premiums. This skin-in-the-game positioning holds firm despite dark fleet uncertainties, though a surprise ceasefire or unreported transits could challenge resolution if official IMF Portwatch tallies exceed the range.

markets.question: Will Wuthering Heights be the top grossing movie of 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the title of the film with the highest 2026 gross according to the "Gross" column on https://www.boxofficemojo.com/year/2026/?grossesOption=calendarGrosses once data for December 31 is made available. 

Note: This market is about the movie's domestic calendar gross in 2026 - dates outside of 2026 will not count toward this movie's gross.

In the event of an exact tie the film that comes first alphabetically will be considered the winner.

If there is no final data available by January 7, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

events.title: Highest grossing movie in 2026?
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the title of the film with the highest 2026 gross according to the "Gross" column on https://www.boxofficemojo.com/year/2026/?grossesOption=calendarGrosses once data for December 31 is made available. 

Note: This market is about the movie's domestic calendar gross in 2026 - dates outside of 2026 will not count toward this movie's gross.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors Spider-Man: Brand New Day as the 2026 highest-grossing film at 61.5% implied probability, propelled by its record-breaking trailer that amassed 1 billion views in just four days last month—the first ever for any film—and glowing fan reactions emphasizing emotional depth and high-stakes action with Tom Holland's Peter Parker. Fresh CinemaCon footage unveiled on April 15 further amplified presales tracking, positioning it for a massive July 31 summer opening akin to No Way Home's $1.9 billion haul, with projections exceeding current leader The Super Mario Galaxy Movie's $941 million worldwide gross to date. Avengers: Doomsday trails at 18.5% on $2.5 billion early forecasts despite its December 18 slot, while early-year hits like Michael and Project Hail Mary fade amid blockbuster competition; watch July tracking updates for momentum shifts.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Moscow be 23°C on May 13?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Vnukovo International Airport in degrees Celsius on 13 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=UUWW

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest forecast ensembles from ECMWF, GFS, and Russia's Hydrometeorological Center project Moscow's May 13 daytime highs clustering at 20-22°C, driving trader consensus toward 20°C and 21°C as leading outcomes with equal 37% implied probabilities. This follows a cool spell with recent highs near 14°C on May 10-11, now shifting to a warming trend via southerly winds and partial clearing skies ahead of light rain (0-3 mm expected). Differentiating factors include variable cloud cover potentially capping peaks at 20°C versus brief sun breaks pushing 21°C, against May climatological averages of 18-19°C. New model runs due within 24 hours could refine resolution amid inherent short-range uncertainty in boundary layer conditions.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket closely splits between 33°C (27.5%) and 34°C (27.5%) as Lagos's highest temperature on May 12, driven by short-term forecast models showing peak daytime highs in this range amid the early rainy season's onset. NiMet's 2026 seasonal climate prediction highlights high-intensity rainfall potential for Lagos in May, fostering convective showers and increased cloud cover that cap temperatures below recent late-April peaks near 34°C. Recent observations at Murtala Muhammed Airport logged highs around 33°C, with humidity above 70% and sea breezes moderating peaks. Differentiating factors include afternoon shower timing—persistent overcast favors 33°C or 32°C (19.5%), while brief clearing allows 34°C—per ensemble model runs; final NiMet updates today could tip the balance before observations resolve the market.

markets.question: Will Paloma Valencia place 2nd in the 1st round of the 2026 Colombian presidential election?
markets.description:
Colombia's presidential elections are scheduled for May 31, 2026, and a second round (if required) on June 21, 2026, in case no candidate secures more than 50% of the valid votes in the first round.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate who receives the second-most valid votes in the first round of this election.

The named candidates will be primarily ranked by the number of valid votes received in the specified election. If two or more candidates are tied on valid votes, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the candidates' last names. This market will resolve to the candidate that occupies the second-highest finishing position after applying this ranking.

If the results of the first round of the Colombian presidential election are not known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the election results, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by Colombia's National Civil Registry (Registraduría Nacional del Estado Civil) (https://registraduria.gov.co).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors Abelardo de la Espriella for second place in Colombia's May 31 first-round presidential election, reflecting recent polls like Guarumo/Ecoanalítica and GAD3 where he edges Paloma Valencia by 1-8 points behind frontrunner Iván Cepeda Castro's 35-44% support. De la Espriella's outsider appeal via Movimiento Salvación Nacional and emphasis on security has regained momentum after Valencia's March surge tied to her Centro Democrático primary win, amid mutual social media attacks and fragmented right-wing votes post-March parliamentary elections. Cepeda's 10% implied probability accounts for slim risks of a surprise first-place upset, while Valencia trails due to base erosion from internal disputes. A June 21 runoff looms as no candidate nears 50%, with upcoming debates potentially shifting the tight second-place contest.

markets.question: Map Handicap: INOX (-1.5) vs MOUZ NXT (+1.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 5 match between MOUZ NXT and INOX Division in the CCT Europe Series 1 Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 11 at 7:00AM ET.

markets.question: Map 2: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 2 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 2, or if Map 2 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Will Jorge Rodríguez be the de facto leader of Venezuela at the end of 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the individual who de facto holds and exercises the powers of the head of state of Venezuela on December 31, 2026 at 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, “de facto holds” refers to the individual who exercises primary executive authority over the Venezuelan state at that time, including effective control over the armed forces, national institutions, and core executive decision-making, regardless of formal title, constitutional designation, or international recognition.

Formal appointment, recognition by the United Nations, or recognition by foreign governments is not required.

If more than one individual claims to be head of state, this market will resolve to the individual who demonstrably exercises primary governing control within Venezuela’s territory at the specified time.

If no individual exercises effective governing control at the specified time, this market will resolve to “No Head of State”.

Indicators of de facto authority may include control over the armed forces and security services; control over executive ministries and state administrative institutions; enforcement of national laws; issuance of binding national directives; and effective control over the capital and core state infrastructure.

Symbolic status, foreign recognition without domestic control, nomination without effective authority, or expired prior service will not qualify.

The primary resolution source will be a consensus of credible reporting assessing who exercises effective governing authority at the specified time.

markets.question: Internazionali BNL d'Italia: Lorenzo Musetti vs Casper Ruud
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Lorenzo Musetti and Casper Ruud in the Internazionali BNL d'Italia, originally scheduled for May 12, 2026 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Lorenzo Musetti' if Lorenzo Musetti advances against Casper Ruud.

This market will resolve to 'Casper Ruud' if Casper Ruud advances against Lorenzo Musetti.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Lorenzo Musetti advanced to face Casper Ruud in the Internazionali BNL d'Italia round of 16 after a gritty 7-6, 6-4 win over Francisco Cerundolo, but raised fitness alarms with visible right thigh discomfort, tears, and post-match admission of struggling at less than 100% due to tension and bandaging. Ruud, a clay-court specialist, cruised in straight sets past Jiri Lehecka following an earlier defeat of Zachary Svajda, extending his strong 5-2 clay record this season amid positive momentum. Ruud holds a 2-1 head-to-head edge, including recent wins, while home-crowd support bolsters eighth seed Musetti on his favored surface despite injury uncertainty and inconsistent 2026 clay form.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chengdu be 36°C on May 12?

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects tight uncertainty in short-term temperature forecasts for Chengdu, with 31°C leading at 28.5% implied probability amid competing 30°C and 32°C outcomes at 19.5% each, driven by divergent model outputs and variable cloud cover. The China Meteorological Administration forecasts a cloudy May 12 high of 29°C following today's observed 30°C peak under overcast skies, while Weather Channel models project 31°C (87°F) with partly cloudy conditions allowing greater afternoon insolation and boundary layer heating. Recent days show a mild warm spell—29°C on May 9 and 30°C today—above May climatological averages of 27–28°C, but persistent Sichuan Basin humidity and light winds (<12 km/h) cap extremes. New model runs overnight and real-time METAR observations will refine diurnal peaks before resolution.

markets.question: Will Scream 7 be the top grossing movie of 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the title of the film with the highest 2026 gross according to the "Gross" column on https://www.boxofficemojo.com/year/2026/?grossesOption=calendarGrosses once data for December 31 is made available. 

Note: This market is about the movie's domestic calendar gross in 2026 - dates outside of 2026 will not count toward this movie's gross.

In the event of an exact tie the film that comes first alphabetically will be considered the winner.

If there is no final data available by January 7, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors Spider-Man: Brand New Day as the 2026 highest-grossing film at 61.5% implied probability, propelled by its record-breaking trailer that amassed 1 billion views in just four days last month—the first ever for any film—and glowing fan reactions emphasizing emotional depth and high-stakes action with Tom Holland's Peter Parker. Fresh CinemaCon footage unveiled on April 15 further amplified presales tracking, positioning it for a massive July 31 summer opening akin to No Way Home's $1.9 billion haul, with projections exceeding current leader The Super Mario Galaxy Movie's $941 million worldwide gross to date. Avengers: Doomsday trails at 18.5% on $2.5 billion early forecasts despite its December 18 slot, while early-year hits like Michael and Project Hail Mary fade amid blockbuster competition; watch July tracking updates for momentum shifts.

eventMetadata.context_description: Retired Army Maj. Gen. Bert Mizusawa leads trader consensus at 46% implied probability to win Virginia's Republican U.S. Senate primary on August 4, positioning him as the frontrunner against Sen. Mark Warner in the general election, due to his slim edge in the latest Public Sentiment Institute poll (May 1-5; Mizusawa 24%, Kim Farington 22%, David Williams 10%) and superior Q1 fundraising ($192,000 raised vs. Farington's $126,000 and Williams' $51,000). The Republican Party of Virginia certified these top three candidates last month after signature qualification, with Mizusawa's military credentials appealing to primary voters in a low-turnout contest. Farington trails closely at 31%, underscoring the competitive field, while others remain longshots; upcoming debates could shift dynamics.

No injuries or cancellations have surfaced in the past week, with both fighters matching at 5'11" and hitting 155.5 lbs in prior weigh-ins; traders price Gantt's explosive finishing ability (average fight time 2:47) and athletic edge over Ogden's submission grappling (average 14:44) as key differentiators, though Ogden's Octagon experience poses upset potential via control time. markets.question: Iran leadership change by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Supreme Leader of Iran, Mojtaba Khamenei, ceases to be the de facto leader of Iran at any point between market creation and the listed date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Mojtaba Khamenei will be considered to no longer be the de facto leader of Iran if he is removed from power, is detained, or otherwise loses his position or is prevented from acting as the de facto leader of Iran within this market's timeframe.

An official announcement of Mojtaba Khamenei’s resignation or removal will qualify for a "Yes" resolution regardless of when the announced departure goes into effect.

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on further Iran leadership change reflects deep uncertainty over Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's capacity two months after his March 2026 appointment following US-Israeli strikes that killed his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, and severely injured him. Western reports cite burns impairing speech, multiple leg surgeries, and prosthetic needs, with no public appearances since; Iranian officials counter he is in excellent health, participating via audio calls and handwritten messages relayed by couriers. President Masoud Pezeshkian's recent 2.5-hour meeting described him as humble, amid shaky Hormuz Strait ceasefire talks and regime use of AI videos for optics. Ongoing war escalation risks or diplomatic breakthroughs could prompt Assembly of Experts action on succession.

eventMetadata.context_description: Burnley and Wolverhampton Wanderers sit mathematically relegated from the Premier League with 21 and 18 points respectively after 36 matches each, their poor goal differences of -36 and -41 underscoring winless runs that sealed their fate weeks ago. The final drop spot hinges on the tight relegation scrap above, where West Ham (36 points from 36 games) trail Tottenham (37 from 35) by a single point, both desperate to avoid joining them in the Championship. Nottingham Forest and Leeds United hold 43 points but remain vulnerable with one game in hand for Leeds. Recent shifts include Tottenham climbing out of the bottom three via a 2-1 win at Aston Villa, Forest securing safety with a 3-1 at Chelsea and 5-0 rout of Sunderland, while West Ham's struggles persist. Critical fixtures ahead: Tottenham host Leeds, West Ham face Newcastle away, with home advantage and head-to-head form pivotal.

markets.question: Will Munetaka Murakami hit the most home runs during the 2026 MLB regular season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the player who records the most home runs during the 2026 Major League Baseball regular season.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official leader as determined by the rules of the MLB. If multiple leaders are announced then this market will resolve to the player with the higher slugging percentage during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, then this market will resolve in favor of the player with the higher batting average during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, this market will resolve in favor of the player that records more hits during the 2026 MLB regular season. If a tie still persists, this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB regular season is cancelled, postponed after October 15, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no official leader declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from MLB; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 120-139 tweets from May 8 to May 15, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from May 8 12:00 PM ET to May 15, 2026 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: US x China Military clash before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a military encounter between the military forces of China (People's Republic of China) and the United States between market creation and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A "military encounter" is defined as any incident involving the use of force such as missile strikes, artillery fire, exchange of gunfire, or other forms of direct military engagement between Chinese and United States military forces. Non-violent actions, such as warning shots, artillery fire into uninhabited areas, or missile launches that land in territorial waters or pass through airspace, will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution. Intentional ship ramming that results in significant damage to (e.g., a hole in the hull) or the sinking of a military ship by another will count toward a "Yes" resolution, however minor damage (scrapes, dents) will not.

Note: the China Coast Guard (CCG) is part of the Chinese military and the United States Coast Guard is part of the United States military.

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: US intelligence community's March 2026 Annual Threat Assessment determined Chinese leaders do not plan a Taiwan invasion in 2027 and lack a fixed timeline, debunking prior concerns over the "Davidson window" and driving trader consensus to a 92.5% implied probability of no US-China military clash before then. Ongoing People's Liberation Army activities in the Taiwan Strait, including major deployments in early May, reflect gray-zone coercion and environmental shaping rather than imminent invasion preparations. Diplomatic channels remain open, with a top US diplomat in Taiwan urging Beijing on April 11 to abandon threats, amid economic interdependence and US focus on Middle East tensions. No major escalatory incidents have occurred in the past 30 days, though miscalculation risks persist ahead of potential Trump-Xi summit talks. Late-breaking military actions or diplomatic breakdowns could still shift odds.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy holds a clear edge over Wave Esports in their BO3 matchup at Exort Series #25 Main Stage, a C-Tier European online event with a 16-team Swiss bracket feeding into playoffs. As Team Spirit's academy squad, they leveraged roster depth and strong recent form—going 3-0 in Main Stage with wins over Wave (2-1), Phantom Academy (2-0), and a forfeit—to reach the final, ultimately placing 2nd. Wave advanced via contenders but crashed out 0-3 amid stand-ins (cMS, pxsl) and map struggles, underscoring vulnerabilities in the current CS2 meta favoring T-side aggression and economy management. No roster changes or developments since the April 26 playoffs.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Turkey" or "Turkiye" in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between May 1, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

markets.question: Israel x Hezbollah diplomatic meeting by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between representatives of Israel and Hezbollah by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of Israel and Hezbollah who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding Israel-Hezbollah relations on behalf of their governments/leadership structures. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify. 

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the government of Israel and Hezbollah leadership, and a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the NY-07 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NY-07 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

events.title: NY-07 House Election Winner
events.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NY-07 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices a Democratic Party victory in New York's 7th congressional district at 93.5% implied probability, driven by the district's entrenched D+25 Cook Partisan Voting Index—the 29th most Democratic nationwide—and lopsided historical results, including Nydia Velázquez's 78%-22% win in 2024. Despite her November 2025 retirement creating an open seat, the progressive enclaves of Bushwick, Williamsburg, and Long Island City favor Democrats, with no credible Republican challenger emerging; Melvin Rivera holds the GOP primary slot. The crowded Democratic primary on June 23, featuring Antonio Reynoso, Claire Valdez, and Julie Won amid strong fundraising, will select a nominee poised for November dominance. Realistic challenges include a post-primary scandal derailing the Democrat, high-profile GOP recruitment, or an unprecedented national Republican wave flipping deep-blue seats.

markets.question: Will Rodez AF achieve promotion from Ligue 2 to Ligue 1 for the 2026-27 season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed team achieves promotion from the French Ligue 2 to Ligue 1 for the 2026–27 season at the conclusion of the current league season. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Official promotion is defined as a team clinching a place in Ligue 1 for the 2026–27 season through their final standing in the Ligue 2, via playoff victory, or by any other official league decision recognized by the Ligue 1 and Ligue 2.

If the 2025-26 Ligue 2 season is cancelled, postponed after June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there are no teams confirmed for promotion within that timeframe, the corresponding market will “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official announcements from Ligue 1 and Ligue 2. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Ligue 2: Team promoted to Ligue 1
events.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed team achieves promotion from the French Ligue 2 to Ligue 1 for the 2026–27 season at the conclusion of the current league season. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

If the 2025-26 Ligue 2 season is cancelled, postponed after June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there are no teams confirmed for promotion within that timeframe, the corresponding market will “No”.

The primary resolution source will be official announcements from Ligue 1 and Ligue 2. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Troyes have clinched the Ligue 2 title and automatic promotion to Ligue 1 with 67 points from 34 matches, topping the table on superior goal difference (+27). The second automatic promotion spot remains undecided after Le Mans' decisive final-day clash at Bastia was abandoned in stoppage time amid crowd trouble—Le Mans led 2-0 (potentially 2-1) when flares and smoke bombs halted play, delaying their likely jump to 62 points ahead of Saint-Étienne (60 pts). Red Star FC and Rodez AF (both 58 pts) lurk for promotion playoffs with third place, where the winner faces Ligue 1's 16th-placed side in a two-legged tie. Traders eye the league's ruling on the suspended result and playoff bracket.

markets.question: Will Seattle have between 0.5 and 1 inches of precipitation in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total precipitation in inches in Seattle between May 1 and May 31, 2026, 11:59PM ET according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).

The resolution source for this market will be NOAA, specifically the figure for May 2026 when the "Monthly summarized data" for "Seattle City Area" is selected with the variable set to "Precipitation" at the https://www.weather.gov/wrh/climate?wfo=sew link once that figure is finalized for the whole month of May 2026.

If the reported data falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

The resolution source for this market measures precipitation to 2 decimal places (e.g., 1.54), thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. Any revisions to precipitation recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will the Republicans win the 2028 US Presidential Election?
markets.description:
The 2028 United States presidential election will be held on Tuesday, November 7, 2028.

This market will resolve to the political party whose candidate is elected the next President of the United States in the 2028 election.

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same party. If all three sources haven’t called the race for the same party by the inauguration date (January 20, 2029) this market will resolve based on who is inaugurated.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices Democrats at a 60.5% implied probability to win the 2028 presidential election, reflecting President Trump's falling approval ratings in the mid-30s and historical midterm penalties for the incumbent party ahead of November 2026 contests, where markets favor Democrats regaining House control at 79%. Odds for Democrats recently hit a 61% peak in mid-April amid policy turbulence in the Trump administration, including high expected cabinet turnover like Kash Patel's 65% chance of departing before 2027. Early polls show JD Vance leading Republican nomination odds at 37% and Gavin Newsom topping Democrats at 24%, but an open-seat race post-term limits amplifies uncertainty, with 2026 results poised to influence primary momentum and battleground turnout.

markets.question: Abstract FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Fully Diluted Valuation of Abstract's governance token is greater than the value specified in the title 1 day after launch. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No."

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Abstract doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will a dozen eggs cost between $2.75–3.00 in April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the bracket within which the price for "Eggs, Grade A, Large (Cost per Dozen) in U.S. City Average" lies when the April data point is published by the St. Louis Fed (https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/APU0000708111).

The St. Louis Fed bases its numbers for egg prices on the BLS's CPI release. The April release is presently scheduled for May 12, 2026. Resolution of this market will take place upon the update of the St. Louis Fed's chart. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

The resolution source for this market measures prices to the third decimal place. Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The St. Louis Fed bases its numbers for egg prices on the BLS's CPI release. The April release is presently scheduled for May 12, 2026. Resolution of this market will take place upon the update of the St. Louis Fed's chart. If no data for the specified month is released by the date the next month's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available month.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders assign a 64% implied probability to the BLS U.S. city average retail price for Grade A large eggs in April 2026 landing in the $2.25–2.50 range, with 24% on $2.00–2.25, reflecting consensus on continued softening from Q1 trends amid avian flu recovery. Bureau of Labor Statistics data confirms March's $2.35 per dozen average, down from February's $2.50 and January's $2.58, as laying hen flocks rebounded from 2025's highly pathogenic avian influenza outbreaks that culled millions of birds and spiked prices above $4. Fewer 2026 cases boosted supply, pressuring retail levels despite low wholesale benchmarks near $0.17 per dozen. Upcoming April CPI release, due mid-May, could catalyze shifts if production data surprises.

markets.question: Will Victor Wembanyama win the 2026 Western Conference Finals MVP?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 Western Conference Finals Most Valuable Player award for the 2026 NBA Playoffs.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by NBA rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 NBA Playoffs are cancelled, postponed after June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from the NBA; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Shai Gilgeous-Alexander at 65% implied probability for Western Conference Finals MVP, reflecting Oklahoma City Thunder's dominant playoff run as defending champions with a perfect early record and top seed positioning for home-court advantage in the anticipated series against the San Antonio Spurs. SGA's league-leading playoff PER of 34.9 through semifinals, averaging 30.6 points, 7.6 assists, and consistent scoring outbursts like 42 points in first-round Game 3, underscore his frontrunner status amid OKC's potential sweep of the Lakers for maximum rest. Victor Wembanyama trails at 24%, buoyed by his explosive 39 points, 15 rebounds, and 5 blocks in Spurs' Game 3 semifinal win over Minnesota on May 9, keeping San Antonio alive despite a tied 2-2 series and his Game 4 ejection. Lower odds for Anthony Edwards and others signal trader expectations of those teams' eliminations.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jannik Sinner commands 70% implied probability as the clear trader consensus favorite for the 2026 French Open, fueled by his flawless 12-0 clay record this season, including Masters 1000 titles at Monte-Carlo over Carlos Alcaraz and Madrid against Alexander Zverev, showcasing elevated baseline play and serving dominance on the surface. Alcaraz's withdrawal due to a lingering right wrist injury—sustained in Barcelona and sidelining him from Madrid, Rome, and Roland Garros—has cratered his chances to 0.1%, clearing Sinner's path as top seed. Zverev at 7% reflects his consistent clay prowess and projected No. 2 seeding amid Djokovic's match-win drought on the surface. Rising Spaniard Rafael Jodar (4.2%), a 2024 US Open junior champ now ATP No. 34, surges on a hot Rome run, upsetting Matteo Arnaldi in R3, while Djokovic lingers at 4% despite experience, highlighting vulnerability in a wide-open field beyond Sinner.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Singapore be 30°C on May 12?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Singapore Changi Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 12 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Singapore Changi Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/sg/singapore/WSSS.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 41% implied probability for Singapore's highest temperature reaching exactly 32°C on May 12, closely trailed by 31°C and 33°C at 19.5% each, aligning with the Meteorological Service Singapore's (MSS) 4-day forecast of a 33°C maximum amid inter-monsoon conditions featuring afternoon thundery showers over northern, eastern, and central regions. These showers, expected to reduce solar insolation and suppress peak heat through increased cloud cover and precipitation, explain the slight trader discount from the official projection, consistent with May's climatological average high of around 32°C and recent patterns of 33–35°C daily maxima tempered by wet weather in early May 2026. Updated 24-hour MSS guidance and real-time observations from Changi Airport station, the likely resolution site, could refine these odds before resolution.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Spread: Coritiba FBC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for May 17 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Coritiba FBC" if Coritiba FBC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Santos FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on cbf.com.br. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Santos FC vs. Coritiba FBC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Brazil Série A game, scheduled for May 17 at 10:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Santos hosts Coritiba in the Copa do Brasil fifth-round first leg at Estádio Urbano Caldeira, leveraging strong home advantage and recent head-to-head dominance, including 4-0 and 2-0 wins in 2024 Serie B clashes. Santos' mixed recent form (two wins, one draw, two losses in last five) faces challenges from injuries to Rony, Mayke, Gabriel Menino, and Vinicius Lira, prompting improvisation at right-back despite Neymar and Gabigol availability in a projected 4-2-3-1 under Cuca. Coritiba, with one win and four draws lately, misses Keno, Pedro Morisco, and Rodrigo Rodrigues, relying on Pedro Rocha up top amid solid away resilience. Traders eye key matchups, potential clean sheets, and aggregate implications in this knockout tie.

markets.question: Al Shabab Saudi Club vs. Al Ittihad Saudi Club: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Saudi Professional League game between Al Shabab Saudi Club and Al Ittihad Saudi Club, scheduled for April 10 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Al Shabab Saudi Club and Al Ittihad Saudi Club each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on slstat.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Al Shabab Saudi Club vs. Al Ittihad Saudi Club - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Saudi Professional League game, scheduled for April 10 at 2:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Al Ittihad sit sixth in the Saudi Pro League table with 42 points from 26 matches, but their recent form has faltered with just one win in the last five games (1W-2D-2L), exacerbated by the winter departures of stars Karim Benzema to Al Hilal and N'Golo Kanté, leaving gaps in attack and midfield amid fan frustration ahead of a King's Cup semi-final. Al Shabab, 12th on 29 points, host at SHG Arena on April 10 showing sharper scoring edge lately (three wins in five, 12 goals), buoyed by home strength despite mid-table position and forward Mohammed Harbush sidelined long-term with a cruciate injury. Al Ittihad hold a strong head-to-head edge, unbeaten in the last five meetings, setting up a competitive Riyadh clash influenced by rest advantages and tactical adjustments.

markets.question: Will David Njoku play for Indianapolis Colts in 2026-27?

If David Njoku does not officially join a new team by August 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

If David Njoku joins a team that is not listed, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution sources for this market will be official announcements from the NFL and/or the acquiring team. A consensus of credible media reporting may also be used to resolve the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Free agent tight end David Njoku's visit with the Los Angeles Chargers earlier this week has driven trader consensus to a dominant 75.6% implied probability for him joining Los Angeles in 2026-27, fueled by the team's glaring need for a versatile pass-catcher to bolster Justin Herbert amid Jim Harbaugh and Greg Roman's run-heavy scheme that prioritizes multi-role tight ends. After announcing in February he won't re-sign with the rebuilding Cleveland Browns—who hold $24M dead cap but added draft picks at TE—Njoku remains unsigned post-2026 NFL Draft despite prior links to Denver, Miami, and Baltimore. Contenders like the Indianapolis Colts (48.7%), Tennessee Titans (47.9%), New York Jets (47.7%), and Philadelphia Eagles (47.5%) maintain competitive odds around 47% due to cap space, young quarterbacks needing red-zone weapons, and thin tight end depth charts league-wide.

markets.question: Total Kills Over/Under 62.5 in Game 2?
markets.description:
In the upcoming match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:30PM ET:

This market is about the total kills in Game 2.

This market will resolve to "Over" if the total kills in Game 2 is 63 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under".

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.


In Dota 2, a "kill" for markets like team total kills, kill handicap, and interval kills is counted when an enemy hero dies and the game awards a hero kill event to the opposing team's score, which is the number shown on the in-game scoreboard and tracked in scoreboard feeds as team kills. In practical terms, this includes any enemy hero death that increments a team's kill score, regardless of who got the last hit, including situations where the victim dies to creeps, a tower, or neutrals as long as the kill is still credited to the enemy team. It does not include denies, such as killing your own allied units, and it also does not include building or objective destructions like towers, barracks, or Roshan, since those are tracked separately from kills. Assists also do not count as kills, because they are recorded as a separate player stat and multiple players can assist on a single kill.

events.title: Dota 2: Nigma Galaxy vs REKONIX (BO3) - 1win Essence Group B
events.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Nigma Galaxy and REKONIX in the 1win Essence Group B, initially scheduled for May 2 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Nigma Galaxy" if Nigma Galaxy win the match against REKONIX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Nigma Galaxy dominates Group B in the 1win Essence I Tier 2 Dota 2 tournament with a 4-0 record and 8-0 maps through clean sweeps, including a 2-0 group stage win over REKONIX on May 2, fueled by veteran carry No!ob, recent addition Davai on offlane, and coach KuroKy's strategies adapting to the current patch's versatile meta. REKONIX, a rising Indonesian squad with stable roster since 2025 and trial coach MinD_ContRoL since April, sits 2-2 after mixed results against lower seeds, relying on aggressive laning from Jikroy and inYourdreaM but vulnerable to Nigma's macro execution. No roster changes or stand-ins reported; full-strength matchup emphasizes draft flexibility and series momentum in this round-robin BO3.

markets.question: Will Liberal Alliance be part of the next Government of Denmark?
markets.description:
A Parliamentary election is scheduled to be held in Denmark on March 24, 2026.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the listed political party is included in the first Danish government formed after the 2026 Danish parliamentary election. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market may resolve once the first government is officially confirmed following the appointment of the Prime Minister and ministers by the monarch after the 2026 Danish parliamentary election, with ministers sworn in under non-caretaker circumstances.

A party will only be considered part of the government if it participates in the governing coalition and provides at least one cabinet minister. Parties that merely support the government from outside the cabinet (e.g., through parliamentary support agreements or similar arrangements) without holding a cabinet post will not qualify.

If no government is formed, or the results are not known definitively by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve based on a consensus of credible reporting. In case of ambiguity, this market will resolve based on official information from the Government of Denmark.

Jordan edging Bad Bunny at market-implied odds of 23.9% to 22.5%, trader consensus reflects a nail-biter race for People's Sexiest Man Alive 2026, driven by Jordan's enduring appeal as 2020 winner bolstered by recent BAFTA and Golden Globes red carpet dominance, contrasted with Bad Bunny's explosive crossover momentum from music chart-toppers and WWE ventures capturing Gen Z and Latinx fandom. Breakout Heated Rivalry stars Connor Storrie and Hudson Williams, at 9.5% and 9%, surge on the HBO series' erotic romance phenomenon since late 2025, amplified by their Milan Fashion Week runway debuts and Met Gala buzz, challenging veterans like Timothée Chalamet and Ryan Gosling. Fragmented sentiment persists amid social media campaigns, with People magazine's traditional November reveal as the key catalyst.

eventMetadata.context_description: No. 4 seed Barbora Krejcikova, ranked No. 53 with a 4-4 record in 2026, meets No. 111 Victoria Jimenez Kasintseva in the Parma Ladies Open first-round clay-court clash on May 11. Krejcikova returns from a lengthy injury absence, securing her first win since February—a 6-2, 6-4 defeat of Elsa Jacquemot in Rome last week—before a straight-sets loss to top seed Aryna Sabalenka, highlighting potential rust despite her 2021 Roland Garros title. Kasintseva, 8-10 this year, advanced via qualifying for main-draw entry and brings junior pedigree as former world No. 1. No head-to-head exists; mild weather poses no delays. Trader consensus reflects Krejcikova's experience edge on clay against the qualifier's upset potential.

markets.question: Will Partido dos Trabalhadores (PT) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Brazilian Senate election. 

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the PL to win the most seats among the 54 up for grabs in Brazil's October 4, 2026, senatorial election, reflecting recent state-level polls showing PL candidates leading or competitive in key electoral colleges like São Paulo, Minas Gerais, and Paraná. Early May surveys from Genial/Quaest and others highlight right-wing dominance, bolstered by PL's current status as the Senate's largest party with 16 seats and aggressive chapas formation for pro-opposition slates. PODEMOS trails as a strong secondary right-wing contender with regional edges, while centrão parties like UNIÃO, REPUBLICANOS, and MDB lag amid fragmented fields. Flávio Bolsonaro's tight presidential polls provide coattails, though coalition shifts or turnout could influence outcomes ahead of the vote.

markets.question: Will Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) hit (LOW) $3.50 Week of May 11 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 11 2026, any 1-minute candle for Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Opendoor Technologies Inc. (OPEN) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.OPEN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Gemini 3.2 released by May 22, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Google's Gemini 3.2 model is made available to the general public by the specified date (ET). Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

Gemini 3.2 refers to a product explicitly named Gemini 3.2, or a variant that is recognized as a direct successor to Gemini 3.1, similar to the progression from Gemini 3 to Gemini 3.1. (e.g., Gemini 3.2 GA, Gemini 3.2/3.3/3.4, etc., in any variant, like Pro/Deep Think/Flash/Flash-lite, would qualify toward a "Yes" resolution to this market).

Specialized models for non-text modalities such as video generation (e.g., Veo), image generation (e.g., Imagen, Nano Banana), music generation (e.g., Lyria), or robotics (e.g., Gemini Robotics) will NOT qualify, even if released under the Gemini 3.2 version number. Products labeled as a GA promotion of an already-existing Preview model (e.g., Gemini 3.1 GA) or a new flagship generation (e.g., Gemini 4) or similar that are not explicitly labeled as described above will NOT qualify.

A qualifying model must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be either clearly defined and publicly announced by Google as being accessible to the general public or otherwise made publicly accessible and explicitly labeled within the company's official website. Labeling errors, placeholder text, or version names displayed on the website that do not correspond to a model that is actually accessible to the general public will not qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from Google, with additional verification from a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump announce that the United States blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has been lifted by May 22, 2026?
markets.description:
On April 12, 2026, President Donald Trump announced that the United States will blockade the Strait of Hormuz. You can read more about that here: https://www.nbcnews.com/world/iran/live-blog/live-updates-us-iran-fail-reach-deal-peace-talks-day-negotiations-rcna315918.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if President Trump, the US government, or the US military publicly and officially announces the end of the United States blockade of the Strait of Hormuz by the specified date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

Qualifying statements must clearly and explicitly indicate that the United States has lifted, ended, or will lift or end its blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on a specified date or use equivalently definitive language unambiguously signaling that such blockade has ceased or is set to cease on a specified date (e.g., statements unambiguously indicating that US naval activity in the relevant area has ceased will qualify). 

Statements that merely describe actions inconsistent with the blockade (e.g., "Iran resumed shipping through the Strait of Hormuz") without explicitly indicating the blockade as lifted will not alone suffice.

Informal announcements, statements from unnamed sources, or leaks do not qualify.

Written public statements from Donald Trump (e.g., posts from his personal Truth Social account) will qualify. Videos posted on his social media accounts will also qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official statements from the US government and/or its official representatives; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

Note: this market will resolve solely based on whether a qualifying announcement is made within the specified timeframe. Whether the blockade is effectively enforced or whether maritime traffic resumes absent a qualifying announcement will not be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Trump rejected Iran's latest counterproposal on May 11, 2026, deeming it "totally unacceptable" for demanding war reparations, full sanctions relief, and Iranian control over the Strait of Hormuz, ensuring the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports and ships remains firmly in place. Imposed on April 13 after collapsed Islamabad talks amid the ongoing Iran conflict, the blockade counters Tehran's prior restrictions and tolls on maritime traffic, stranding vessels and spiking oil prices. Trump paused "Project Freedom" ship escorts last week to prioritize negotiations, but no deal is imminent, with traders eyeing potential diplomatic breakthroughs or escalations like naval clashes as key catalysts for any lifting announcement.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Seoul be 13°C on May 12?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Incheon Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 12 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Incheon Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/kr/incheon/RKSI.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

Trader consensus at over 90% implied probability underscores this path, though a last-minute coalition breakdown, parliamentary defections, or presidential pivot to alternatives like Jernej Vrtovec could upend it.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 840-879 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

markets.question: Will Trump say "Darth Vader" in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Donald Trump mentions the listed term between May 1, 2026, 12:00 AM ET and May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

A ‘mention’ will include any verbal mention which is recorded (audio or video) and publicly accessible.

Written usages of terms (e.g. Truth Social posts, written statements, etc.) will not count toward this market's resolution.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

Videos posted on his social media which were filmed outside this market's time frame will not qualify for a "Yes" resolution.
